hero.title: UAE's Premier Platform for Commercial-Scale Industrial 3D Printing
hero.lede: Robotic concrete and polymer LFAM for buildings, facades, hospitality and government projects — from concept to site installation.

facility.label: FACILITY
facility.title: See LFAM in Production
facility.lede: Facility tours are part of our four-step engagement — from initial briefing through technical capability profile access.

testimonials.t1quote: ELM delivered exactly the LFAM capability we needed — technical depth, commercial discipline, and on-site execution aligned with our programme.
testimonials.t2quote: From design intent through fabrication, ELM's team integrated seamlessly with our consultants and kept the LFAM programme on track.
testimonials.t3quote: Commercial-scale 3D printing is only valuable when it ships to site — ELM understood that from day one and delivered production-ready components.
testimonials.t4quote: Robotic concrete LFAM at architectural scale — executed with European engineering standards and UAE delivery discipline.

homeCapabilities.label: TECHNOLOGIES
homeCapabilities.title: Commercial LFAM Platform
homeCapabilities.lede: Robotic precision, digital-first design and on-demand production — built for architectural scale in the UAE.
homeCapabilities.card1Copy: Structural printing without conventional formwork — buildings, infrastructure and urban furniture with up to 60% less material waste.
homeCapabilities.card2Copy: 6-axis robotic extrusion for facades, lighting, retail and branded environments — complex geometry without mould tooling.
homeCapabilities.card3Copy: End-to-end fabrication from digital model to rapid site installation for hospitality, retail and public landmark projects.

homeAbout.title: Closing the UAE LFAM Capability Gap
homeAbout.lede: Commercial LFAM in Dubai — robotic concrete and polymer printing from concept to site installation.

homeWhyHub.whyLede: Faster programmes. Near-zero waste. No geometry limits.
homeWhyHub.policyLede: Built around the mandates shaping UAE construction and procurement.

homeMetrics.label: Selected work
homeMetrics.title: LFAM Projects
homeMetrics.lede: From landmark retail installations to airport infrastructure — commercial LFAM with European engineering standards and UAE execution.
homeMetrics.p1Copy: Large-format printed elements for a premium retail environment — complex geometry without conventional formwork.
homeMetrics.p2Copy: Robotic concrete service module inside a live airport logistics zone — concept to handover in 100 days.
homeMetrics.p3Copy: Pipeline programmes across hospitality, government and infrastructure — qualified RFQ response within 72 hours.
